parsed.summary: The change is a minor release housekeeping commit that renames an npm scope, adds an interactive re-configuration menu to /glm:setup, updates the changelog, and revises release_card.md. All changes are in documentation, metadata JSON, and a Markdown command file — no runtime code, no auth/data paths, no state mutations, and no executable logic. No material adversarial finding can be defended from the diff.
